name: route_finding
description: Route a discovered finding (test failure, lint error, gate violation) to the correct downstream disposition (in-scope fix, defer-with-ticket, sibling-spec handoff) per the discovered-issue-disposition-guard. Wraps discovered-issue-disposition-guard.sh. The optional envelope parameter points to a result envelope JSON that the guard inspects for finding ledger consistency.

spec_dir.description: Spec directory whose finding ledger should be classified.

envelope.description: Optional path to a result envelope JSON (relative to repo root or absolute).
